name: notipo
description: Notipo API — publish blog posts from content to WordPress via notipo.com
notes: Notipo syncs Notion pages to WordPress — but the CLI can also create posts directly
CLI usage: npx notipo posts create --title 'Title' --body 'markdown content' --publish --wait
CLI usage: npx notipo posts list --limit 5
CLI usage: npx notipo jobs (check sync job status)
Website: notipo.com — Kjetil's SaaS product, needs marketing

endpoints: POST /api/posts — create a post (title, body, slug, publish)
